title: Ops and infra tolerates infra-local continuity
description: Infra probes can keep more technical continuity, but they should stay infra-local.
query: Ops and infra: gateway cron failure, provider failover, and Telegram bridge debugging.

nodes.value: Infra continuity depends on gateway failover, cron visibility, and provider fallback.
For infra incidents, trace gateway, cron, provider, and bridge layers in that order.
Ops and infra threads should keep handoff notes concrete so debugging continuity is preserved.
Health and wellbeing check-ins should stay centered on sleep, energy, and recovery.
Memrok should preserve inspectability and judgment in memory retrieval.
